Notes.Text:
This update for GraphicsMagick fixes the following issue

- CVE-2026-42050: stack buffer overflow in XTileImage (bsc#1265048).

Vulnerabilities.Description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to 7.1.2-21 and 6.9.13-46, a malicious MIFF file could trigger an overflow when a user opens it in the display tool and right-clicks a tile to invoke the Load / Update menu item. This vulnerability is fixed in 7.1.2-21 and 6.9.13-46.
